scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration

scripts.prestart: Checks if frontend build is found, and if not, builds the frontend into frontend/dist/ (doesn't work in Windows command prompt or powershell, use git bash, if you don't have git bash, build frontend manually)
scripts.test: runs both unit- and integration tests
scripts.db:make: creates a knex migration template with name specified by user
scripts.db:seed: creates a knex seed template with name specified by user

dependencies.bcrypt: Used for hashing passwords, based on the blowfish cipher
dependencies.cors: CORS is used to enable cross-origin resource sharing, allowing the backend to handle requests from different origins
dependencies.cross-env: Required for NODE_ENV to work on Windows
dependencies.express-rate-limit: Used to limit log-in attempts from IP addresses
dependencies.memorystore: Used to prevent memory leaks caused by express-session (https://www.npmjs.com/package/memorystore)
dependencies.passport-local: Plugins that the passport uses as strategies (https://github.com/jaredhanson/passport-local)
dependencies.zod: Used in error handling (input validation). More documentation (https://zod.dev/)

devDependencies.devDependencies: packages used only during testing and development
devDependencies.eslint: ESLint is used to maintain code quality and consistency (automatic testing of code style)
devDependencies.globals: Globals is used to define global variables for ESLint
devDependencies.nodemon: Nodemon is used for hot reloading the running server when new changes are saved
devDependencies.passport-strategy: Can be used to create custom passport strategies. Used in tests to simulate local login
devDependencies.supertest: Module for testing HTTP, to allow using lower-level API provided by superagent
